assertions.text: Roughly diagnoses the user's intent before acting (does not jump straight to code/pixels).
Routes to the appropriate sub-design skill based on the diagnosed intent.
Follows the diagnose to reference to direction to output to review order, iterating with the user.

cases.prompt: I need a logo and a brand identity for my product

assertions.text: Diagnoses this as a logo/brand task and routes to the logo-generator path.
Plans to iteratively develop the output with the user rather than one-shotting it.
